_comment: DANGER_MODE overlay for OPA approval policy. Per operator 2026-06-01 'dangerously approve'. Broadens auto-allow but per global §42 the hardest gates remain locked.
_warning: Loading this file makes OPA approve a wider class of actions without operator confirmation. Use ONLY in trusted single-tenant dev/staging environments.

approval._acknowledgement: Operator acknowledges DANGER_MODE expanded auto-approve. §42 hard gates (force-push to main, prod data destruction, external messaging, package publishes, secret-store mutations) remain locked regardless of this overlay.
